name: Baxter International, Inc.
h1: Baxter International's GCC footprint in India
lede: Baxter International runs five centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Ahmedabad and Gurugram, covering SSC, R&D and CoE, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Baxter International office in India. We map five, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Baxter International GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Baxter International runs 5 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Gurugram), covering SSC, R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Baxter International's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Ahmedabad and Gurugram, spanning SSC, R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 28 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Baxter International operate in India?
faq.a: Baxter International operates 5 active centers in India.

faq.a: Baxter International's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 2 additional cities.

faq.a: Baxter International runs SSC and 2 additional center types centers in India.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Baxter International's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
